metadata.description: Making the Claude Code workflow even easier.

plugins.name: date-context
plugins.description: Injects today's date into Claude's context on every session start. Fixes the 'Claude doesn't know what day it is' problem.

plugins.name: session-finder
plugins.description: Indexes Claude Code sessions on exit and provides a skill to find past sessions by natural language description.

plugins.name: worktree-manager
plugins.description: Manage persistent git worktrees for parallel human+AI development across sessions. Create, list, remove worktrees and merge worktree branches back with conflict resolution.

plugins.name: md-to-gdoc
plugins.description: Convert markdown documents into properly formatted Google Docs using the Google Workspace CLI (gws). Supports custom format profiles extracted from reference Google Docs.

plugins.name: timewatch-fill
plugins.description: Fill TimeWatch attendance via browser automation (claude-in-chrome). Supports filling a single day or range of days with configurable times, task, and location.
